name: pipen-gcs

metadata.name: pipen-gcs
metadata.summary: A plugin for pipen to handle file metadata in Google Cloud Storage

documentation:
# pipen-gcs

A plugin for [pipen][1] to handle files in Google Cloud Storage

## Installation

```bash
pip install -U pipen-gcs

# uninstall to disable
pip uninstall pipen-gcs
```

## Usage

```python
from pipen import Proc, Pipen

class MyProc(Proc):
    input = "infile:file"
    input_data = ["gs://bucket/path/to/file"]
    output = "outfile:file:gs://bucket/path/to/output"
    script = "cat {{in.infile}} > {{out.outfile}}"

class MyPipen(Pipen):
    starts = MyProc
    # input files/directories will be downloaded to /tmp
    # output files/directories will be generated in /tmp and then uploaded
    #   to the cloud storage
    plugin_opts = {"gcs_localize": "/tmp"}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    MyPipen().run()
```

You can also disable localization, then you will have to handle the
cloud storage files yourself.

```python
from pipen import Proc, Pipen

class MyProc(Proc):
    input = "infile:file"
    input_data = ["gs://bucket/path/to/file"]
    output = "outfile:file:gs://bucket/path/to/output"
    script = "gsutil cp {{in.infile}} {{out.outfile}}"

class MyPipen(Pipen):
    starts = MyProc
    plugin_opts = {"gcs_localize": False}

if __name__ == "__main__":
    MyPipen().run()
```

## Configuration

- `gcs_localize`: The directory to localize the cloud storage files. If
  set to `False`, the files will not be localized. Default is `False`.
- `gcs_credentials`: The path to the Google Cloud Service Account
  credentials file.

[1]: https://github.com/pwwang/pipen

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils._mtime
documentation:
Get the modification time of a blob

Args:
    blob (storage.Blob): The blob to get the modification time

Returns:
    float: The modification time

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.parse_gcs_uri
documentation:
Parse a Google Cloud Storage URI

Example:
    >>> parse_gcs_uri("gs://bucket/path/to/file")
    ("bucket", "path/to/file")
    >>> parse_gcs_uri("gs://bucket/path/to/dir/")
    ("bucket", "path/to/dir/")
    >>> parse_gcs_uri("gs://bucket/")
    ("bucket", "")

Args:
    uri (str): The URI to parse

Returns:
    tuple[str, str]: The bucket and the path

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.get_gs_type
documentation:
Get the type of a file/dir in Google Cloud Storage

Example:
    >>> get_gs_type(client, "gs://bucket/")
    "bucket"
    >>> get_gs_type(client, "gs://bucket/path/to/dir/")
    "dir"
    >>> get_gs_type(client, "gs://bucket/path/to/file")
    "file"
    >>> get_gs_type(client, "gs://bucket/not/exist")
    "none"

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the file in Google Cloud Storage

Returns:
    str: The type, either bucket, dir, file or none (not exists)

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.update_plugin_data
documentation:
Update the plugin data for a job

Args:
    job (Job): The job to update
    key (str): The key to update
    value (Any): The value to update

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.get_plugin_data
documentation:
Get the plugin data for a job

Args:
    job (Job): The job to get the data from
    key (str): The key to get
    default (Any, optional): The default value to return. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    Any: The value of the key

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.download_gs_file
documentation:
Download a file from Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the file in Google Cloud Storage
    localpath (str | Path): The local path to download

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.download_gs_dir
documentation:
Download a file from Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the file in Google Cloud Storage
    localpath (str | Path): The local path to download

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.get_gs_mtime
documentation:
Get the modification time of a file/dir in Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the file in Google Cloud Storage
    dir_depth (int): The depth of the directory to check

Returns:
    float: The modification time

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.clear_gs_file
documentation:
Clear a file from Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the file in Google Cloud Storage

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.clear_gs_dir
documentation:
Clear a directory from Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the directory in Google Cloud Storage

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.gs_dir_exists
documentation:
Check if a directory exists in Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the directory in Google Cloud Storage

Returns:
    bool: True if the directory exists

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.gs_file_exists
documentation:
Check if a file exists in Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the file in Google Cloud Storage

Returns:
    bool: True if the file exists

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.upload_gs_file
documentation:
Upload a file to Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    localpath (str | Path): The local path to upload
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the file in Google Cloud Storage

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.upload_gs_dir
documentation:
Upload a directory to Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    localpath (str | Path): The local path to upload
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the directory in Google Cloud Storage

functions.name: pipen_gcs.utils.create_gs_dir
documentation:
Create a directory in Google Cloud Storage

Args:
    client (storage.Client): The Google Cloud Storage client
    gs_uri (str): The URI of the directory in Google Cloud Storage

classes.name: pipen_gcs.PipenGcsPlugin

methods.name: pipen_gcs.PipenGcsPlugin.on_init
documentation: Initialize the plugin

methods.name: pipen_gcs.PipenGcsPlugin.on_start
documentation: Login to Google Cloud Storage using the credentials if provided

A plugin for pipen to handle file metadata in Google Cloud Storage

Configurations:
    gcs_localize: False or a directory to download files to and upload back
        the output files. If False, the plugin will not download or upload
        files. The job script should handle the files in the cloud.
    gcs_credentials: The path to the Google Cloud Storage credentials file.
